task_completion.description: Navigate to the patient record for Sven Goran.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent searching for or opening the profile/chart for the patient named 'Sven Goran'.

task_completion.description: Access the medication orders for Sven Goran.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the medication list, prescriptions, or pharmacy orders section within Sven Goran's record.

task_completion.description: Identify and select the active order for Ibuprofen 400mg.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the specific 'Ibuprofen 400mg' order that has an 'Active' (or similar non-cancelled) status.

task_completion.description: Mark the active Ibuprofen 400mg order as 'Completed'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the status of the active 'Ibuprofen 400mg' order for Sven Goran successfully changed to 'Completed' (or Dispensed/Fulfilled, depending on the UI).

task_completion.description: Ensure the cancelled order for Sven Goran is not marked as completed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show that the other 'Ibuprofen 400mg' order for Sven Goran, which was originally marked as cancelled, remains untouched and is NOT marked as 'Completed'.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse clicks, form submissions, and UI navigation rather than terminal commands executing scripts to update the database.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual medical/EMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface belongs to a functional web or desktop application, not a text editor or a locally created HTML mock-up.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing the backend database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots of database management tools (like SQLite browser, psql, or mongo shell) being used to change the order status.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Patient: Sven Goran. Target Medication: Ibuprofen 400mg. The correct order to dispense is the active one (internal ID: medication_target_sven). The agent must not dispense the cancelled order for Sven (internal ID: medication_distractor_sven_cancelled) or the order for another patient (internal ID: medication_distractor_janice).
